title: TagFoods
description: Applies a tag to all edible items
body:
Ever wondered what foods were in that large mod pack you're playing? Ever wished there was some easy way to find all foods from all your installed mods?

 

TagFoods attempts to add a foods tag to all food items it detects in your game. This allows you to use tools such as JEI to search for any food item.

 

**Dependencies:**

- Kotlin For Forge

I also recommend you install something that lets you search by tags, such as JEI, otherwise this mod is fairly useless. The mod must be present on both the server and client for the tag to show correctly.
 

**Known Issues:**

- Some foods that are not edible from the inventory, such as cakes, are not tagged correctly.
- Some mods may add tags that start with foods such as "foodstuffs". These may show up in a search for foods even if they are not edible, depending on your search settings. Do not report this as an issue.
